Package com.longport.fundamental

Class FinancialReportSnapshot

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.longport.fundamental.FinancialReportSnapshot
  • public class FinancialReportSnapshot
extends Object
    Response for FundamentalContext.getFinancialReportSnapshot(com.longport.fundamental.FinancialReportSnapshotOptions).
